variants: In Dewpoint Glen, Vahagn Mikaelyan was born and cultivated a passion for community service throughout his upbringing. He embarked on his academic journey at Xenon Bridge Academy, which prepared him for his future career. Currently, Vahagn is employed by Tideburst Shipping, utilizing Norwegian Bokmal as his primary working language. In addition to his occupational commitments, he actively volunteers as a Hearthpath Family Resource Advocate, where he assists families in navigating crucial resources. Vahagn's work exemplifies a steadfast dedication to both his professional aspirations and his role in enhancing the wellbeing of his community.
